commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=757853b3f55ac1ac2b0dd4166f17b695398aea08)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes shared doctor empty-allowlist scanning and policy code to suppress a parent-level group allowlist warning when every enabled account has a non-empty raw `groupAllowFrom`, and adds scanner regression tests.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +69. Total +101 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main scans the parent channel record before account records, and doctor preview wires plugin hooks so the reported parent-scope warning path is reachable; I did not run tests because this was a read-only checkout review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the contributor proof gate is still mock/test-only and maintainers should choose or repair one canonical fix path among the sibling PRs without bypassing external proof.

target.title: fix(doctor): skip parent-level empty-group-allowlist warning when every account has groupAllowFrom
target.body:
## Summary

Doctor over-warned on an empty top-level `groupAllowFrom` despite populated per-account allowlists (2026.6.5). The scanner always emitted a parent-level warning before checking per-account allowlists.

## Fix

Added `allAccountsHaveGroupAllowlist` boolean flag propagated through `checkAccount` → `collectEmptyAllowlistPolicyWarningsForAccount`. When every enabled account has `groupAllowFrom` populated, the parent-level empty-allowlist warning is suppressed.

## Files changed
- `src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-scan.ts` — scanner flag propagation
- `src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-policy.ts` — policy skip gate
- `src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-scan.test.ts` — 3 new regression tests

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Doctor always emitted `Empty groupAllowFrom` for parent config even when all child accounts had `groupAllowFrom` populated, creating false positives.

**Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw checkout at PR head, macOS/Darwin arm64, Node v22.22.0.

**Before-fix (upstream/main 8eb1fa09c6):**
```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-scan.test.ts
✓ 3 passed (0 regression tests for this scenario)
```

**After-fix (this branch, +3 new tests):**
```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/empty-allowlist-scan.test.ts
✓ 6 passed (3 existing + 3 new regression tests)
```

**What the 3 new tests verify:**
1. No warning when parent has empty groupAllowFrom but all accounts have it populated
2. Warning still fires when some accounts lack groupAllowFrom
3. Warning suppressed when every enabled account has groupAllowFrom

Closes #92684
